title: gomphandra sawiensis
intro: Gomphandra sawiensis, also known as the Philippine periwinkle tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gomphandra sawiensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and made into a tea or infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
